basic.title: Set up your business
basic.motto: Install the system and load the minimum you need to start selling.

intermediate.title: Your first sale
intermediate.motto: The full cycle: quote, approve, deliver and review.

advanced.title: Master the operation
advanced.motto: Suppliers, purchases, inventory and packaging rules.

f12.title: Install the system
f12.why: It is the very first step: it creates the tabs, headers and formulas where your business will live.

f13.title: Configure the business
f13.why: You define the rules that build the price: margin, VAT, rounding and the sizes you will sell.

f07.title: Your first customer
f07.why: Every quote is made out to a customer. Without a customer there is no one to quote.

f08.title: Your first supplies
f08.why: Supplies (ingredients and packaging) are the basis of every cost: this is where their price and stock live.

f10.title: Your first recipe
f10.why: The recipe defines what your product contains and how many servings it yields. It is what the quote scales.

f01.title: Quote
f01.why: Putting a price on what you are asked for: you pick a customer and recipe, scale the quantity and the system works out the price.

f02.title: Approve
f02.why: The moment to decide: if the customer accepts, you approve and the order is born with its materials list.

f03.title: Produce and deliver
f03.why: Move the order from Pending to Production and to Delivered. On delivery, the sale is recorded automatically.

f04.title: Review the business
f04.why: Your day-to-day dashboard: at a glance you see what needs your attention, without touching anything.

f09.title: Your supplier
f09.why: Their WhatsApp lets you order from them in one click from «Comprar materiales».

f05.title: Buy and record
f05.why: Restocking: you order from the supplier over WhatsApp and, when the material arrives, you record the purchase.

f06.title: Adjust the inventory
f06.why: For when something gets damaged, expires or the real count does not match the system.

f11.title: Packaging rules
f11.why: So the quote suggests just the right packaging based on the size, without you having to remember it.

f12-1.title: Open the installer
f12-1.instruction: In your spreadsheet, open the Sistema menu, go into Mantenimiento and tap Instalar o reparar (todo).
f12-1.detail: The Sistema menu appears in the top bar of Google Sheets, next to Help.
f12-1.hint: If you don't see the Sistema menu, close and reopen the file: the menu is created on open.

f12-2.title: Wait for the «Listo» notice
f12-2.instruction: Wait without closing the file until the «Listo» notice appears with the number of sheets created and checked.
f12-2.detail: The first time it may take several minutes, because it creates all the sheets.
f12-2.hint: If it times out, the full manual has «Maintenance in parts» (Flow 14).

f12-3.title: Confirm the tabs
f12-3.instruction: Look at the bottom: the Resumen tab should appear first, with the rest behind it (Config, Insumos, Presupuestos, Pedidos, Clientes, Proveedores, Recetas…).
f12-3.whatHappens: All the sheets are created with their headers and formulas. Columns that compute themselves come with a green header. It is safe to repeat the installation: it never deletes your data, it only repairs what is missing.

f13-1.title: Open the configuration
f13-1.instruction: Open the Sistema menu and go into Configuración.

f13-2.title: Your hourly rate
f13-2.instruction: Enter the labor rate per hour: how much an hour of your work is worth.
f13-2.detail: It feeds the cost of every quote: the recipe's hours are multiplied by this rate.

f13-3.title: Fixed costs per order
f13-3.instruction: Set the indirect cost and the depreciation per order: fixed amounts for electricity, gas or wear on your equipment.

f13-4.title: Your profit
f13-4.instruction: Define the default margin, as a percentage. It is your profit on the sale.
f13-4.detail: Every quote comes with it preset and you can change it case by case.

f13-5.title: VAT and rounding
f13-5.instruction: Decide whether to apply VAT (and its rate) and leave the rounding at «round up to a multiple of 5» for tidy prices.

f13-6.title: Validity and stock
f13-6.instruction: Set the quote's expiry days and choose the stock discount moment: on approval or when production starts.
f13-6.detail: How many days your quote is valid, and when the system discounts the materials from inventory.

f13-7.title: Your sizes
f13-7.instruction: Review the list of sizes with their factor: small 0.5, medium 1, large 2.
f13-7.detail: The factor multiplies the recipe: a large carries twice the ingredients of a medium.

f13-8.title: Name and save
f13-8.instruction: Enter your business name and tap Guardar.
f13-8.whatHappens: You land on the Config sheet, with 4 editable blocks: General parameters, Scaling factors, Sizes and Adjustment types. What you change here affects new quotes, never the ones already saved.

f07-1.title: Open customers
f07-1.instruction: Open the Sistema menu, go into Clientes and tap Nuevo cliente.

f07-2.title: Their name
f07-2.detail: It is required and cannot be exactly the same as another customer's.

f07-3.title: Their phone
f07-3.instruction: Set their phone (999000111) and notes if you like. Both are optional.

f07-4.title: Save
f07-4.whatHappens: The CL-0001 row appears on the Clientes sheet. You now have someone to quote.

f08-1.title: Open supplies
f08-1.instruction: Open the Sistema menu, go into Insumos and tap Nuevo insumo.

f08-2.title: The flour
f08-2.instruction: Create Harina: type ingredient, unit grams, presentation 1000, price S/ 5, minimum 2000. Tap Guardar.
f08-2.detail: You'll see «Price per base unit» = 0.005 (5÷1000) and the indicator in red (stock 0).

f08-3.title: The eggs
f08-3.instruction: Create Huevo: ingredient, presentation 30, price S/ 15, minimum 30. Tap Guardar.
f08-3.detail: «Price per base unit» = 0.5 (15÷30): each egg costs you 50 cents.

f08-4.title: The box
f08-4.instruction: Create Caja torta: type packaging, presentation 25, price S/ 25, stock 50, minimum 10. Tap Guardar.
f08-4.whatHappens: The computed columns («Price per base unit» and «Indicator») update themselves when the price or stock changes. Don't touch them by hand. The box's indicator comes out green (50 > 10).

f10-1.title: Open recipes
f10-1.instruction: Open the Sistema menu, go into Recetas and tap Nueva receta.

f10-2.title: Name and category
f10-2.instruction: Enter the name Torta chocolate and the category tortas.

f10-3.title: How many it yields
f10-3.detail: This is the key to scaling: if you are later asked for 20 people, the system multiplies everything by 2.

f10-4.title: Your work
f10-4.detail: It is multiplied by the hourly rate you set in Configuración.

f10-5.title: The ingredients
f10-5.instruction: Add the ingredients: Harina 300 (the unit comes by itself: g) and Huevo 4 (u).
f10-5.hint: If they don't show in the dropdown, go back to the previous mission: you have to create the supplies first.

f10-6.title: Save
f10-6.instruction: Tap Guardar. The form requires at least one ingredient.
f10-6.whatHappens: The recipe RC-0001 is saved. Always write it for a convenient base: the system scales it by itself when quoting. Changing it later does not affect quotes already saved.

f01-1.title: Open the form
f01-1.instruction: Open the Sistema menu and tap Nuevo presupuesto.

f01-2.title: The customer
f01-2.hint: If someone new shows up mid-quote, the «+» button next to Customer creates them without leaving the form.

f01-3.title: The recipe
f01-3.detail: The scaling mode sets itself to «By people» and the table brings in Harina and Huevo with their price.

f01-4.title: The quantity
f01-4.detail: The recipe's base is 10, so the factor is 2: Harina goes to 600 g and Huevo to 8 u. The cost is recalculated instantly.

f01-5.title: Try by size
f01-5.instruction: Change the mode to «By size» and choose grande.
f01-5.detail: The «grande» factor is also 2. If the recipe has a packaging rule (you'll define it in the advanced level), the suggested packaging appears with its box checked.

f01-6.title: Margin and VAT
f01-6.instruction: Review the costs (labor, indirect, depreciation), adjust the margin and check Apply VAT.
f01-6.detail: The final price updates by itself and is rounded up to the multiple of 5.

f01-7.title: Save
f01-7.instruction: Write notes if needed and tap Guardar.
f01-7.whatHappens: The quote P-0001 is born in Pending status, issued today with the expiry from your Configuración. Its prices are frozen: even if you change your costs later, this one does not move. It does not touch inventory yet.

f02-1.title: Open your quotes
f02-1.instruction: Open the Sistema menu and tap Ver presupuestos. Then open the detail of P-0001 with Ver.

f02-2.title: Read the shortages
f02-2.instruction: In the detail, read the shortages notice.
f02-2.detail: You'll see that Harina and Huevo will go negative, because their stock is 0. It is informational: it does not prevent approval.

f02-3.title: Approve
f02-3.whatHappens: P-0001 moves to Approved and the order PD-0001 (Pending) is born with its requirements list. If your configuration discounts stock on approval, it drops now; if not, it will drop when production starts.
f02-3.hint: If the customer doesn't accept, the Reject button saves the reason and no order is born.

f03-1.title: Open your orders
f03-1.instruction: Open the Sistema menu and tap Ver pedidos. Open the detail of PD-0001 with Ver.

f03-2.title: Into production
f03-2.instruction: On PD-0001 (Pending), tap Producción and confirm.
f03-2.detail: If your system discounts stock when production starts, this is where it drops.
f03-2.whatHappens: The order moves to Production. From here on you are working the order.

f03-3.title: Deliver
f03-3.instruction: When you finish the order, on the order in Production tap Entregar and confirm.
f03-3.whatHappens: The delivery date is recorded and the sale VT-0001 is born with the quote's final price. You closed the cycle: from quoting to selling. If the order falls through, «Cancel» returns only the stock consumed (a Delivered one can no longer be canceled).

f04-1.title: Go to the Overview
f04-1.instruction: Open the Sistema menu and tap Ir al Resumen.

f04-2.title: Read it at a glance
f04-2.instruction: Look at the quotes that are pending, expiring and expired; the orders that are pending, in production and delivered; the supplies that are out of stock or below the minimum; and the list of alerts.
f04-2.whatHappens: The panel is read-only and redraws itself: on opening the file and after every action that moves something (approve, deliver…). Don't write over it.

f09-1.title: Open suppliers
f09-1.instruction: Open the Sistema menu, go into Proveedores and tap Nuevo proveedor.

f09-2.title: Their name
f09-2.detail: It is required and cannot be exactly the same as another.

f09-3.title: Their WhatsApp
f09-3.instruction: Set their WhatsApp with country code: 51999111222, with no spaces or symbols.
f09-3.detail: It is what builds the link to order from them in one click.

f09-4.title: Save
f09-4.whatHappens: The PR-0001 row appears. Now you can set them as «recommended supplier» on your supplies.

f05-1.title: Build the order
f05-1.instruction: Open the Sistema menu and tap Comprar materiales.

f05-2.title: Choose the shortages
f05-2.detail: The shortages (Harina, Huevo) appear grouped by supplier, with the last price paid. Manual mode lists all supplies, with those below the minimum already checked.

f05-3.title: Order over WhatsApp
f05-3.detail: The chat opens with the message already written to ask about availability and price.
f05-3.whatHappens: This still does not change stock: it only builds the order to the supplier. Stock goes up when you record the received purchase.

f05-4.title: The material arrived
f05-4.instruction: When you receive the purchase, open the Sistema menu and tap Registrar compra. Supplier Molinos SAC, today's date.

f05-5.title: The lines and save
f05-5.instruction: Line Harina: quantity 5 (presentations), price 5.50. Line Huevo: quantity 2, price 15. Tap Guardar and confirm.
f05-5.detail: You receive in presentations, not in grams: 5 bags of 1000 g.
f05-5.whatHappens: The purchase CMP-0001 is saved. Harina raises its presentation price to 5.50 (base unit 0.0055), stock goes up 5×1000 = 5000 g and the indicator stops being red. Costs up to date and shortages covered.

f06-1.title: Open the adjustment
f06-1.instruction: Open the Sistema menu and tap Ajustar inventario.

f06-2.title: The supply and the adjustment
f06-2.instruction: Search for Caja torta. Adjustment type shrinkage, quantity 5, reason «got damaged».
f06-2.detail: Shrinkage, damage and expiry remove stock; return brings it back; count you write with a sign (a minus to remove).

f06-3.title: Preview and save
f06-3.instruction: Look at the preview (how the stock and indicator end up) and tap Guardar.
f06-3.whatHappens: It is recorded in Movements with date, type and reason, and the stock of Caja torta drops by 5. You'll always be able to trace why the inventory is the way it is.

f11-1.title: Open the rules
f11-1.instruction: Open the Sistema menu, go into Reglas de empaque and tap Nueva regla.

f11-2.title: Recipe and size
f11-2.detail: The dropdown only shows the sizes defined in Configuración.

f11-3.title: Packaging and save
f11-3.whatHappens: The rule RL-0001 is saved. When you quote Torta chocolate in size grande, the system will propose 1 Caja torta automatically (with a box you can uncheck). And with this you master the whole operation!
